# Prompt: Add Feature

Use the supervisor agent to deliver a new feature end-to-end.

## Input
- Feature summary
- Target project type (greenfield or existing)
- Constraints (deadline, compliance, integrations)

## Orchestration request
1. Start with architecture analysis.
2. Route to API/Persistence/Integration/Security/Observability/Testing as needed.
3. Return generated artifacts and validation summary.
